paragraphs: Overdue climbed to 180 — we need to reverse this today. This is above the 7-day average of 98 — the trend is heading the wrong direction. 44 tasks are actively in progress — that's solid execution across the board. 2 tasks should be active but are stuck waiting on blockers — these need immediate attention.

**Rohini Williams (CNG2025-496):** The oldest overdue task is 15 days past due with 39 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **74 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late.

**Stephanie and Marc Felton:** The oldest overdue task is 44 days past due with 34 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **27 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 13 payment tasks due this week.

**Martha Cockrell (CNG-20251199):** The oldest overdue task is 12 days past due with 32 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **37 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 7 payment tasks due this week.

**Ginger Brown:** The oldest overdue task is 32 days past due with 20 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **13 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 8 payment tasks due this week.

**Kyle Aubry - Project 01:** The oldest overdue task is 16 days past due with 10 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **21 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 9 payment tasks due this week.

**Lingyan Qiu (CNG2025-458):** The oldest overdue task is 15 days past due with 10 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **32 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 8 payment tasks due this week.

**Clifford Clack — Gym Addition:** 2 overdue — tackle the oldest first, they're the most likely to cascade. **10 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 6 payment tasks due this week.

**Katie Holmes & Sean Springs:** 2 overdue — tackle the oldest first, they're the most likely to cascade. **4 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 4 payment tasks due this week.

287 tasks starting in the next 7 days. **258 of those have nobody assigned** — these need a name on them before they're due or they'll become overdue with no accountability. 71 overdue payments are holding up the pipeline — every day these sit, the schedule slips further. **$0 in payments going out this week** across 58 tasks — make sure funds are available. Heavy week ahead for Rohini Williams (CNG2025-496) and Lingyan Qiu (CNG2025-458) — make sure resources are lined up.

Angel Pacheco: Angel Pacheco is trending in the right direction — overdue is down to 6. Keep the momentum going.

**Lingyan Qiu (CNG2025-458):** 10 overdue (oldest: 15d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. **32 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 41 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Katie Holmes & Sean Springs:** 2 overdue — oldest first. **4 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start.

**Clifford Clack — Gym Addition:** 2 overdue — oldest first. 1 active-blocked — clear the blockers to keep moving. **10 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 13 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Recommendation:** Block 2 hours today to clear the oldest overdue tasks first. If a task is genuinely behind and can't be completed soon, update the schedule dates so we have accurate data.
Jeff: Jeff is trending in the right direction — overdue is down to 2. Keep the momentum going.

**Stephanie and Marc Felton:** 34 overdue (oldest: 44d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. 1 task blocked by payments — escalate, not on you. **27 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 31 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.

**Martha Cockrell (CNG-20251199):** 32 overdue (oldest: 12d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. **37 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 37 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Recommendation:** Knock out the 2 overdue today — each one risks cascading into blocked tasks downstream.
Milagros Porturas: Milagros Porturas is trending in the right direction — overdue is down to 14. Keep the momentum going.

**Rohini Williams (CNG2025-496):** 39 overdue (oldest: 15d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. **74 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 74 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.

**Ginger Brown:** 20 overdue (oldest: 32d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. **13 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 17 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.

**Kyle Aubry - Project 01:** 10 overdue (oldest: 16d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. **21 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 27 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Recommendation:** Block 2 hours today to clear the oldest overdue tasks first. If a task is genuinely behind and can't be completed soon, update the schedule dates so we have accurate data.
